6. ~in_english(nc) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ~in_english(nc) [flattening 6]
8. ! [X0] : (in_english(X0) | ~published_by(X0,nvp)) [ennf transformation 1]
9. ~published_by(X0,nvp) | in_english(X0) [cnf transformation 8]
10. published_by(nc,nvp) [cnf transformation 2]
13. ~in_english(nc) [cnf transformation 7]
14. in_english(nc) [resolution 9,10]
16. $false [forward subsumption resolution 14,13]

% Termination reason: Refutation
